form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Geelong over 460m. Last start finished 4th over 515m at Sandown beaten 5.5 lengths (30.08) behind Lady Rapid in a Restricted WIN on April 2. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 515m at Sandown clocking 29.66. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage third but before that won easily by 3.5 lengths at Horsham (27.32) beating Laminate in a Restricted WIN on April 7. Not keen this time.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Horsham over 410m in 23.46. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 525m at this track at Mix 6/7 level. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Quickly away at Geelong two runs back then again settled forward and finished third at Geelong last start over 460m. Thereabouts and rates well in this. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Shepparton to win by 0.9 lengths in 25.36, beating Koda. Last start finished 6th in a Mix 6/7 on April 11 over 525m at this track behind Mepunga Envy beaten 14 lengths (31.28). Predicted to struggle on this occasion.
